description_long: This is a modern residential bungalow set within a fenced yard, featuring a two-story main building with a red gable roof and white exterior walls. The property includes a detached garage with a matching roof, a wooden pergola-covered deck, and a landscaped garden with trees, shrubs, and a greenhouse. The backyard is equipped with a children's play structure, a small shed, and a paved driveway leading to the garage. The main house has multiple rectangular windows and a balcony overlooking the garden. The perimeter is enclosed by a wooden fence, and the landscaping is well-maintained with flower beds and hedges. The overall layout is spacious, with clear zones for recreation, gardening, and parking.
description: A modern two-story white bungalow with a red gable roof, detached garage, pergola deck, landscaped garden, and fenced yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main house, detached garage, driveway, and front yard with trees and a hammock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the main entrance, garage, tall shrubs, pergola deck, and backyard play area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pergola-covered deck, greenhouse, garden beds, and dense hedge along the property line.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the back of the house, shed, and the play structure near the hedge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
